title: geum viscosum
intro: Geum viscosum, also known as sticky avens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum viscosum include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary problems. Geum viscosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
